visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark, disheveled hair and a mustache, looking distressed. He is wearing a dark jacket. To the left, the profile of another man is partially visible. The background is dark and out of focus, suggesting the interior of a vehicle at night. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera remains steady, capturing the intense and somber mood of the scene. The audio is filled with the sound of a man coughing and breathing heavily, as if he is in distress or has been in a physical altercation. The man with the mustache appears to be speaking, his expression a mixture of pain and urgency. A male voice, strained and raspy, speaks in a low, intense, and slightly breathless tone, conveying a sense of urgency and pain. He says, "因为你知道" (Because you know). The background is silent, making the sounds of the man's struggle and his quiet, pained speech the central focus of the audio.
